title: common-base
description: Shared identity fields every agent config must include. Per ADR-003 §2.1-B + spec gap §2.1-B resolution.

tenant_slug.description: Per-tenant slug; matches Postgres RLS role `ifos_tenant_<slug>` per Day-4 §6.5.

agent_name.description: Matches bundle directory at agents/<vertical>/<agent_name>/ per master brief §8.

agent_version.description: Semver pinned by the bundle's README.md header.

vertical.description: Vertical adapter pinned at bundle author time. Single value in v1.0.

enabled.description: Daemon-required per agent-pty.ts. Renderer sets default true.

runtime.description: Daemon-required. IFOS agents run via Claude Code only.

model.description: Anthropic model ID. Default sonnet for v1.0 6-agent fleet.

max_session_seconds.description: Daemon-required per master brief §2.4 primitive 2 (71h rotation).
